content:
{
  "qa_retry_limit": 5,
  "inject_phase_reminders": true,
  "guardrails": {
    "enabled": false,
    "max_tool_calls": 400,
    "max_duration_minutes": 240,
    "profiles": {
      "architect": {
        "max_duration_minutes": 0,
        "max_tool_calls": 0,
        "max_consecutive_errors": 10
      }
    }
  },
  "docs": {
    "enabled": true,
    "doc_patterns": [
      "README.md",
      "CONTRIBUTING.md",
      "docs/**/*.md",
      "docs/**/*.rst",
      "**/CHANGELOG.md"
    ]
  },
  "ui_review": {
    "enabled": true,
    "trigger_paths": [
      "**/pages/**",
      "**/components/**",
      "**/views/**",
      "**/screens/**",
      "**/ui/**",
      "**/layouts/**"
    ],
    "trigger_keywords": [
      "new page",
      "new screen",
      "new component",
      "redesign",
      "layout change",
      "form",
      "modal",
      "dialog",
      "dropdown",
      "sidebar",
      "navbar",
      "dashboard",
      "landing page",
      "signup",
      "login form",
      "settings page",
      "profile page"
    ]
  },
  "swarms": {
    "mega": {
      "name": "Mega",
      "agents": {
        "coder": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed" },
        "explorer": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed" },
        "explore": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed" },
        "sme": { "model": "kimi-for-coding/k2p5" },
        "critic": { "model": "zai-coding-plan/glm-5.1" },
        "reviewer": { "model": "zai-coding-plan/glm-5-turbo" },
        "test_engineer": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed" },
        "docs": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "designer": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed" }
      }
    },
    "paid": {
      "name": "Paid",
      "agents": {
        "architect": { "model": "opencode/gpt-5-nano" },
        "coder": { "model": "kimi-for-coding/k2p5" },
        "explorer": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed" },
        "explore": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed" },
        "sme": { "model": "nvidia/openai/gpt-oss-120b" },
        "critic": { "model": "nvidia/openai/gpt-oss-120b" },
        "reviewer": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed" },
        "test_engineer": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "docs": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "designer": { "model": "kimi-for-coding/k2p5" }
      }
    },
    "lowtier": {
      "name": "lowtier",
      "agents": {
        "architect": { "model": "opencode/gpt-5-nano" },
        "coder": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "explorer": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed" },
        "explore": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.5-highspeed" },
        "sme": { "model": "nvidia/openai/gpt-oss-120b" },
        "critic": { "model": "kimi-for-coding/k2p5" },
        "reviewer": { "model": "kimi-for-coding/kimi-k2-thinking" },
        "test_engineer": { "model": "minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.1" },
        "docs": { "model": "zai-coding-plan/glm-4.5-air" },
        "designer": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" }
      }
    },
	"modelrelay": {
      "name": "modelrelay",
      "agents": {
        "architect": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "coder": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "explorer": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "explore": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "sme": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "critic": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "reviewer": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "test_engineer": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "docs": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" },
        "designer": { "model": "router/auto-fastest" }
      }
    },
    "local": {
      "name": "Local",
      "agents": {
        "architect": { "model": "DGX/gpt-oss-120b" },
        "coder": { "model": "BDX64/qwen3.5-9b-claude-4.6-opus-reasoning-distilled-v2" },
        "explorer": { "model": "BDMSI13/nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-4b" },
        "explore": { "model": "BDMSI13/nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-4b" },
        "sme": { "model": "BDAIMAX/nvidia/nvidia_nemotron-cascade-2-30b-a3b" },
        "critic": { "model": "DGX/gpt-oss-120b" },
        "reviewer": { "model": "BDAIMAX/nvidia/nvidia_nemotron-cascade-2-30b-a3b" },
        "test_engineer": { "model": "BDX64/qwen3.5-9b-claude-4.6-opus-reasoning-distilled-v2" },
        "docs": { "model": "BDMSI13/nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-4b" },
        "designer": { "model": "DGX/gpt-oss-120b" }
      }
    }
  },
  "max_iterations": 5,
  "gates": {
    "syntax_check": { "enabled": true },
    "placeholder_scan": { "enabled": true },
    "sast_scan": { "enabled": true },
    "sbom_generate": { "enabled": true },
    "build_check": { "enabled": true },
    "quality_budget": {
      "enabled": true,
      "max_complexity_delta": 5,
      "max_public_api_delta": 10,
      "max_duplication_ratio": 0.05,
      "min_test_to_code_ratio": 0.3,
      "enforce_on_globs": ["src/**"],
      "exclude_globs": ["docs/**", "tests/**", "**/*.test.*"]
    }
  },
  "automation": {
    "mode": "hybrid",
    "capabilities": {
      "plan_sync": true,
      "evidence_auto_summaries": true,
      "decision_drift_detection": true,
      "phase_preflight": true,
      "config_doctor_on_startup": true,
      "config_doctor_autofix": true
    }
  },
  "knowledge": {
    "enabled": true,
    "swarm_max_entries": 100,
    "hive_max_entries": 1000,
    "auto_promote_days": 30,
    "max_inject_count": 5,
    "dedup_threshold": 0.6,
    "scope_filter": ["global"],
    "hive_enabled": true,
    "rejected_max_entries": 200,
    "validation_enabled": true,
    "evergreen_confidence": 0.9,
    "evergreen_utility": 0.8,
    "low_utility_threshold": 0.3,
    "min_retrievals_for_utility": 3,
    "schema_version": 1
  },
  "curator": {
    "enabled": true,
    "init_enabled": true,
    "phase_enabled": true,
    "max_summary_tokens": 2000,
    "min_knowledge_confidence": 0.7,
    "compliance_report": true,
    "suppress_warnings": true,
    "drift_inject_max_chars": 500
  }
}
